rationale: The citing paper’s stated contribution and methods focus on quasi-experimental delivery-speed effects and online/offline channel spillovers, while the cited paper is a macro time-series model of aggregate customer satisfaction predicting discretionary spending growth. Nothing in the provided citing-note summary indicates use of aggregate-satisfaction theory, variables, or methods, and the only match evidence is a bare DOI reference, which is more consistent with a background mention than substantive dependence.
